en: "Today also my complaint is bitter; my hand is heavy on account of my groaning.
zh: “直到今日我還有苦情要申訴， 我雖然歎息，他的手仍然沉重。

en: Oh, that I knew where I might find him, that I might come even to his seat!
zh: 但願我知道怎樣能尋見 神， 能到他的臺前來。

en: I would lay my case before him and fill my mouth with arguments.
zh: 好讓我在他面前呈上我的案件， 滿口辯論向他申訴；

en: I would know what he would answer me and understand what he would say to me.
zh: 知道他要回答我的話， 明白他對我說甚麼。

en: Would he contend with me in the greatness of his power? No; he would pay attention to me.
zh: 他會以大能與我相爭嗎？ 必不會這樣，他必關懷我。

en: There an upright man could argue with him, and I would be acquitted forever by my judge.
zh: 在他那裡正直人可以與他彼此辯論， 這樣，我就必永遠擺脫那審判我的。

en: "Behold, I go forward, but he is not there, and backward, but I do not perceive him;
zh: 可是我往前走，他不在那裡； 我若往後退，我也不能見他。

en: on the left hand when he is working, I do not behold him; he turns to the right hand, but I do not see him.
zh: 他在左邊行事，我卻見不到； 他在右邊隱藏，我卻看不見。

en: But he knows the way that I take; when he has tried me, I shall come out as gold.
zh: 可是他知道我所行的道路， 他試煉我以後，我必像精金出現。

en: My foot has held fast to his steps; I have kept his way and have not turned aside.
zh: 我的腳緊隨他的腳步， 我謹守他的道，並不偏離。

en: I have not departed from the commandment of his lips; I have treasured the words of his mouth more than my portion of food.
zh: 他嘴唇的命令我沒有離棄， 我珍藏他口中的言語， 勝過我需用的飲食 。

en: But he is unchangeable, and who can turn him back? What he desires, that he does.
zh: 但是他既已定意，誰能使他轉意呢？ 他心裡所願的，就行出來。

en: For he will complete what he appoints for me, and many such things are in his mind.
zh: 他為我所定的，他必成全， 這類的事情，他還有許多。

en: Therefore I am terrified at his presence; when I consider, I am in dread of him.
zh: 因此我在他面前驚惶， 一想到這事，我就懼怕他。

en: God has made my heart faint; the Almighty has terrified me;
zh: 神使我心裡膽怯， 全能者使我驚惶，

en: yet I am not silenced because of the darkness, nor because thick darkness covers my face.
zh: 因為我在黑暗面前並沒有被消滅， 也不怕幽暗遮蓋著我的臉。”
